description: The ReqView project has been migrated from a legacy system, resulting in some 'dangling' traceability links. Specifically, two requirements in the SRS document contain links pointing to a non-existent document with the ID prefix 'LEGACY'. Identify and remove only these invalid 'LEGACY' links within the SRS document while preserving all valid links (such as those pointing to 'NEEDS'). Save the project once the invalid links are removed.
